query_list: Generate a sales report for Q1 2024

columns.description: Date when the order was placed

args.context: Generate a sales report for Q1 2024

result.sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', order_date) AS month, SUM(order_total) AS sales FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2024-01-01' AND order_date <= DATE '2024-03-31' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

args.content: Report for: Generate a sales report for Q1 2024
args.title: Generate a sales report for Q1 2024
